login.title: Sign in to continue
login.description: Session state is stored in an httpOnly cookie, so the browser cannot read the token directly.

signup.step1Description: A unique 6-character ID will be generated for you. Add a PIN to protect it.
signup.personaIdHint: Not happy with it? Hit Shuffle to get a new one.
signup.emailHint: A 6-digit verification code will be sent to this address.
signup.step2Description: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to activate your account.
signup.writeDown: Write this down — you will need it to log in.
signup.step3Description: Your persona is ready. Save your ID and PIN — they are the only way to log in.

resetPin.requestDescription: Enter your registered email. We will send a verification code to reset your PIN.
resetPin.confirmDescription: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it and set a new 4-digit PIN.
